papers.title: Disentangling the Distant Stellar Halo Using K-Giants in the DESI Year 3 Data
papers.summary: We present a sample of 88,959 K-giants from DESI Milky Way Survey Year 3 data, which we use to characterize the chemo-dynamical properties of the stellar halo at Galactocentric distances of 12 to ~100 kpc. Using HDBSCAN, we identify five prominent stellar halo substructures: Aleph, the Sagittarius stream, Gaia Sausage-Enceladus (GSE), Cetus-Palca and the Orphan-Chenab stream. We present the properties of each of these structures as they appear in our catalog, and examine how uncertainties on distance affect the characterization of substructure with this approach. We also examine regions associated with previously reported overdensities (such as the Virgo Overdensities and the Sagittarius spur) that we do not recover with HDBSCAN. The size and distance range of our catalog allows us to explore in detail the residual stellar halo, comprising stars that we do not associate with any substructure. We find that samples of ~2000 outer halo stars with both highly prograde and highly retrograde angular momenta have similar metallicity distribution functions (MDFs), which do not resemble the MDFs of either GSE or Sagittarius. Both the prograde and retrograde residual halo MDFs are bimodal, with a metal-poor peak at [Fe/H] ~ -2 and a metal-rich peak at [Fe/H] ~ -1.3 (prograde) or -1.5 (retrograde). The MDF for lower angular momentum residual halo K-giants does not show clear evidence for a metal-poor peak, and broadly resembles the MDF of GSE, even at much lower binding energies than GSE itself. We discuss possible interpretations of these findings for GSE accretion scenarios.

papers.title: PMO Polaris CO survey. I. A 100 deg$^2$ view of the Polaris Flare
papers.summary: Large-area CO surveys are essential for studying molecular cloud dynamics and evolution; however, most have focused on the Galactic plane, leaving high-latitude clouds less explored. We present the PMO Polaris CO Survey (PPCOS), which maps a 100~deg$^2$ region of the Polaris Flare in the $J=1-0$ transitions of $^{12}$CO, $^{13}$CO, and C$^{18}$O using the Delingha 13.7~m telescope. As the first large-area CO survey at high Galactic latitude ($|b| > 20^{\circ}$) with sub-arcminute resolution, PPCOS achieves sensitivities of $\sim$0.46~K for $^{12}$CO and $\sim$0.23~K for $^{13}$CO and C$^{18}$O at a spectral resolution of 0.16~km~s$^{-1}$ and an angular resolution of 50\arcsec. The $^{12}$CO emission reveals seven distinct complexes, where only $\sim$10\% of pixels display multiple velocity components, alongside a global velocity gradient of 0.18~km~s$^{-1}$~pc$^{-1}$. Typical line widths are $1.2 \pm 0.6$~\mbox{km~s$^{-1}$} for $^{12}$CO, while $^{13}$CO components are systematically narrower ($\lesssim 0.7\,ΔV_{\rm ^{12}CO}$). The $^{12}$CO/$^{13}$CO intensity ratios (5--25) indicate widespread $^{12}$CO optical thickness, resembling conditions found in giant molecular clouds (GMCs). Globally, the CO emission divides into two groups: a major group aligned with the velocity gradient and a secondary group elongated perpendicular to it, possibly regulated by large-scale coherent dynamics. We propose a three-layer hierarchy: a dynamically assembling and dispersing periphery traced by $^{12}$CO, a more stable intermediate kernel traced by $^{13}$CO, and gravitationally bound compact cores traced by C$^{18}$O. No young stellar objects are firmly associated with the molecular gas. PPCOS provides an ideal laboratory for studying turbulence, hierarchical structure, and early cloud evolution in a nearby, relatively simple molecular cloud.

papers.title: Projecting the ultimate pulsar timing sensitivity to dark matter substructure in a stochastic gravitational wave background
papers.summary: Pulsar timing arrays (PTAs) are sensitive to the gravitational influence of passing compact substructures, which can produce Doppler timing delays by accelerating pulsars or the Solar System barycenter, and Shapiro timing delays when passing near Earth--pulsar lines of sight. Projections for the complete PTA sensitivity to compact dark matter (DM) substructures, such as primordial black holes and axion miniclusters, are challenging due to the variety of signal types ranging from rare, nearly static encounters, to dynamic flybys, to the stochastic limit of many substructures. We address this challenge with a framework that combines Monte Carlo signal modeling and machine-learned surrogate likelihoods, enabling a unified likelihood-level analysis of signals previously treated only in simplified limiting regimes. We then use this framework to precisely assess the impact of a stochastic gravitational wave background (SGWB), for which evidence was recently found, on the PTA sensitivity to compact DM substructures.The SGWB substantially weakens the sensitivity, and we find that in even the most optimistic observing scenario only a Shapiro search retains sensitivity to subdominant DM components when assuming SGWB parameters inferred from current measurements.

papers.title: The Hubble tension: A decade review
papers.summary: Ever since the new millennium, precision cosmology has forged the $Λ$-cold-dark-matter ($Λ$CDM) model as the standard model of concordant cosmology, withstanding various tests except for an ever-enlarging discrepancy between early-Universe observations and late-Universe measurements on the current Hubble expansion rate of our observable Universe. This Hubble-constant tension has likely become a real crisis for modern cosmology, with the discrepancy persisting regardless of whether the early-Universe observations depend on \textit{Planck} CMB or not, and the late-Universe measurements depend on distance ladders at all. If the Hubble tension originates from a different early Universe, its resolutions pertain to shrinking the sound horizon by altering either early expansion or recombination histories, but at the same time necessitating modifications to both primordial and late Universe altogether. Alternatively, if the Hubble tension arises from a different late Universe, its resolutions operate by changing the absolute magnitude of supernovae either intrinsically or effectively, both of which have been strongly constrained by the inverse distance ladders with the cosmic distance duality relation. The remaining options seem to turn to our local Universe, but a local Hubble bubble or cosmic void solution has long been ruled out as a significant contribution to the Hubble tension. In view of this dilemma, we review in this paper alternative resolutions involving interacting dark energy models, either combining early-time and late-time modifications or operating at the transition from inhomogeneity to homogeneity scales.

papers.title: Evolving Dark Energy Is Vacuum Energy After All
papers.summary: We investigate a physically motivated model of dynamical dark energy arising from the non-perturbative topological structure of the Quantum Chromodynamics (QCD) vacuum. Unlike conventional dark-energy scenarios, the model does not introduce any new fundamental field or propagating degree of freedom. Instead, the dark-energy density emerges as a global vacuum effect associated with the response of the QCD vacuum to an expanding spacetime, representing a possible paradigm shift in the interpretation of cosmic acceleration. We develop the first comprehensive cosmological implementation of this QCD-induced dark-energy scenario and confront it with current observations, including the latest combination of Planck, ACT and SPT-3G cosmic microwave background measurements, DESI DR2 baryon acoustic oscillation data, and Type Ia supernova samples from Pantheon+ and DES-Dovekie. We compare the model with both the standard $Λ$CDM cosmology and the widely used CPL ($w_0w_a$CDM) parametrization of evolving dark energy. We find that the model provides an excellent fit to the data and reproduces the late-time dark-energy evolution preferred by DESI observations. The inferred cosmological parameters are robust against different implementations of the dark-energy activation mechanism, indicating that the cosmological predictions are largely insensitive to the specific form of the transition. The model naturally predicts an effective phantom-crossing behaviour at intermediate redshifts while remaining free from the theoretical instabilities commonly associated with phantom scalar-field models. Using a combination of goodness-of-fit statistics and Bayesian model-selection techniques, including Akaike and Deviance Information Criteria and Bayesian evidence estimated from Markov Chain Monte Carlo chains, [abridged]

papers.title: The stability of voids in the local Universe: the role of the cosmological constant
papers.summary: The Vlasov kinetic formalism is employed to study the evolution and stability of cosmic voids in the local Universe, taking into account not only gravitational attraction but also the repulsive effect of the cosmological constant (local dark energy). In accordance with the theorem on the general function for the identity between the gravitational fields of a sphere and a point mass, the cosmological constant provides a natural explanation for the Hubble tension as arising due to local and global flows characterized by different Hubble parameters. The crucial role of the Λ-repulsion in maintaining the stability of voids at the present epoch is demonstrated when Landau damping suppresses discrete collapse modes and prevents random local density perturbations inside the voids from growing and involving new galaxies to the walls. Inside the voids, the Λ-repulsion exceeds the attractive force of the residual matter, driving matter outward and accelerating its migration toward the void boundaries. In the local (late) Universe, cosmic voids have entered a stage characterized by stable and more pronounced walls, as can be studied by observational surveys across different redshift ranges.

papers.title: DESI Data Release 2 ELGs: Property-dependent subsamples, imaging systematics, and clustering
papers.summary: Using emission-line galaxies (ELGs) from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) Data Release 2, we evaluate a property-dependent correction to imaging systematics. We derive systematic weights following the same linear regression method used for other DESI tracers, but do so separately on ELG subsamples to provide a physically-informed alternative to the fiducial, neural-network-based approach. In doing so, we show that the deeper imaging in the Dark Energy Survey (DES) footprint leads to a higher overall number density but a lack of targets with extreme $g-r$ and $r-z$ colors. ELGs in the DES region also show a distinct redshift distribution when subsampled by position in the $g-r$ vs. $r-z$ plane. To address these effects, we implement a separate treatment of the DES footprint within the DESI catalog production pipeline, which is generally well-motivated and, in some cases, imperative for accurate clustering measurements. With DES treated separately, we find that property-dependent systematic weights further mitigate spurious clustering signal in $\sim$10% of subsamples, while the fiducial scheme remains optimal for the full sample.

papers.title: DESI Data Release 2 ELGs: Property-dependent subsamples, imaging systematics, and clustering
papers.summary: Using emission-line galaxies (ELGs) from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) Data Release 2, we evaluate a property-dependent correction to imaging systematics. We derive systematic weights following the same linear regression method used for other DESI tracers, but do so separately on ELG subsamples to provide a physically-informed alternative to the fiducial, neural-network-based approach. In doing so, we show that the deeper imaging in the Dark Energy Survey (DES) footprint leads to a higher overall number density but a lack of targets with extreme $g-r$ and $r-z$ colors. ELGs in the DES region also show a distinct redshift distribution when subsampled by position in the $g-r$ vs. $r-z$ plane. To address these effects, we implement a separate treatment of the DES footprint within the DESI catalog production pipeline, which is generally well-motivated and, in some cases, imperative for accurate clustering measurements. With DES treated separately, we find that property-dependent systematic weights further mitigate spurious clustering signal in $\sim$10% of subsamples, while the fiducial scheme remains optimal for the full sample.

papers.title: The Coherence Principle: A Falsifiable Prior for Model Selection from the Grammar of Theories
papers.summary: Bayesian model selection in cosmology and particle physics is often performed where posterior odds inherit a strong, often unacknowledged dependence on the prior assigned to competing models. Standard responses -- reference priors, hierarchical priors, or appeals to naturalness -- ignore relevant theoretical knowledge or rely on criteria hard to define operationally. We propose the \emph{Coherence Principle}: a reproducible prescription for assigning model priors according to compatibility with the validated structure of an existing theory. This structure, or \emph{grammar}, includes symmetries, conservation laws, locality, Lorentz invariance, and universality patterns. Unmotivated violations of these rules incur a coherence cost, converted into a prior weight through a maximum-entropy exponential form controlled by one calibratable parameter $α$. The resulting prior is distinct from both the Bayesian Occam factor and naturalness: it penalizes not parameter volume or fine tuning, but departures from validated theoretical grammar. We illustrate the principle with examples from cosmology and fundamental physics: neutrino mass mechanisms, dark energy and modified gravity, inflation, beyond-Standard-Model sectors, and hierarchical astrophysical inference. We test it also on four historical cases -- general relativity, Pauli's neutrino, parity violation, and special relativity -- where evidential and theoretical contexts can be reconstructed. These examples show that it favors the historically successful choice when the proper grammar is defined in the correct domain and time. The Coherence Principle makes explicit a common but usually tacit part of physical reasoning: trust in validated structural rules. It turns this judgment into a transparent, testable, and overrulable component of Bayesian inference, leaving empirical likelihoods free to dominate when data are sufficiently constraining.

papers.title: Consistency of DES and DESI distances and the Standard Cosmological Model
papers.summary: We test the consistency of the cosmic distance-redshift relation inferred from the cosmic microwave background (CMB), the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) baryon acoustic oscillation measurements, and the Dark Energy Survey (DES) Type Ia supernovae within the framework of flat $Λ$CDM. DESI recovers the CMB-constrained parameter combination $(r_d h)(Ω_m/0.3)^{0.4}$ with sub-percent precision, demonstrating excellent agreement between BAO measurements at $z \sim 1$ and the acoustic scale at recombination. Imposing the CMB constraint yields an estimate of $Ω_m$ that is slightly lower than, but only in mild tension with, the Planck value. The high-redshift DES supernova sample is well described by the standard cosmological model, whereas the current low-redshift anchor sample exhibits a systematic offset of $\sim 0.05$ mag that drives much of the apparent preference for evolving dark energy. Preliminary data from the Dark Energy Bedrock All-Sky Supernova Program (DEBASS) do not show this offset, suggesting that unresolved low-redshift systematics may account for the discrepancy. These results suggest that a single flat $Λ$CDM model accurately describes the distance-redshift relation from the local Universe to recombination, placing increasingly stringent constraints on new-physics explanations of the Hubble tension.

papers.title: Abundances of CNO in candidate young metal-poor stars
papers.summary: In this contribution we investigate the CNO abundances in five apparently young evolved stars, with the aim of discriminating between truly young stars and stars that were rejuvenated by accreting mass from another star. Stars that have accreted mass are expected to show low C and O and a very low [C/O] ratio, as displayed by some stars in the Globular Cluster 47 Tuc, that are believed to have undergone mass-transfer. In our sample the low [C/O] ratios observed appear to be compatible with their evolutionary status. There is thus no indication for these stars having accreted mass.__

papers.title: From Evidence to Evident: Decisive Cosmological Evidence for the Normal Neutrino Mass Hierarchy
papers.summary: Cosmological data have reached the precision needed to turn the neutrino mass ordering from a weak Bayesian preference into a decisive model-selection test. We compute the evidence for the Normal and Inverted Hierarchies by combining DESI DR2 clustering with NuFIT oscillation data. In baseline $Λ$CDM, DESI DR2 plus Planck CamSpec gives $Σm_ν<0.0642\,{\rm eV}$ at 95\% confidence, close to the normal-ordering floor, $Σm_ν^{\rm NH}\simeq0.059\,{\rm eV}$, but well below the inverted-ordering minimum, $Σm_ν^{\rm IH}\simeq0.099\,{\rm eV}$. Thus the inverted hierarchy lies in the tail of the cosmological likelihood. The Bayes factor $K=P(D|{\rm NH})/P(D|{\rm IH})$ exceeds $460$ even for a conservative reference prior, and remains strong, $K>40$, in baseline-model extensions. We show that this result is robust to the choice between a reference prior and a physically motivated logarithmic hierarchical prior, marking the transition from {\em prior-sensitive evidence} to {\em likelihood-dominated exclusion} of the inverted hierarchy within standard cosmology. Embedding these priors in the two-dimensional design space of measure (logarithmic versus linear in mass) and structure (hierarchical versus non-hierarchical), we find that all four prior constructions give decisive evidence under DESI DR2, with residual prior dependence governed mainly by the measure -- a factor $\sim\!10$ in $K$ -- rather than by the hierarchy assumption. At the prior-family level, the evidence favors the SJPV prior predictive over HS by a Bayes factor above $4,700$ across each matched-support variation tested. The favored normal ordering pushes the effective Majorana mass to the few-meV regime, with median $m_{ββ}=3.28\,{\rm meV}$ and 95\% credible interval $0.95<m_{ββ}<11.55\,{\rm meV}$, below the inverted-ordering target for upcoming neutrinoless double-beta decay experiments.

papers.title: On the robustness of the angular homogeneity scale $θ_H$: a comparative analysis of computational approaches
papers.summary: The assumption of large-scale homogeneity is a cornerstone of modern cosmology and underlies the validity of the FLRW framework. Testing the scale at which the Universe transitions to homogeneity remains a key observational challenge, particularly with the increasing precision of galaxy surveys. We aim to assess the robustness of the angular homogeneity scale, $θ_H$, by systematically comparing different computational approaches used in its estimation and by quantifying the impact of methodological choices and physical clustering scales. We analyse mock galaxy catalogues from the MICE Grand Challenge simulation. The angular fractal dimension $D_2(θ_H)$ is computed using the Landy-Szalay estimator and direct pair-counting methods. We implement different approaches, including symbolic regression, to model $D_2(θ_H)$ and determine $θ_H$. Uncertainties are estimated using resampling techniques and alternative parametric error propagation methods. We find that the estimation of $θ_H$ is sensitive to methodological choices in the analysis, such as survey area, redshift bin, numerical implementation and fitting strategy. While its redshift evolution is robust, its absolute value is sensitive to both modelling choices and the presence of local clustering features. Our results highlight the importance of methodological systematics in homogeneity studies, showing that the determination of $θ_H$ depends not only on the data, but also on the adopted analysis strategy. Flexible approaches such as symbolic regression provide a useful framework to model these effects, but also emphasize the need for careful modelling and survey design. This has important implications for future large-scale structure analyses aiming to test the Cosmological Principle with high precision.

papers.title: Exploring Primordial Non-Gaussianity Measurements in the CSST Spectroscopic Survey
papers.summary: Primordial non-Gaussianity (PNG) is a fundamental probe of the physics of the early Universe and inflation. Here we present a comprehensive study of the constraints on the local-type PNG parameter, $f_{\rm NL}$, for the spectroscopic galaxy survey of the upcoming Chinese Space-station Survey Telescope (CSST). Utilizing the high-resolution Jiutian N-body simulation suite, we construct realistic mock catalogs for emission line galaxies (ELGs) at three representative redshifts $z=0.3$, 0.6, and 0.9. The expected CSST observational characteristics are also considered, including redshift uncertainties and selection functions based on signal-to-noise ratios of emission lines. We develop a robust analysis framework for the redshift-space galaxy power spectrum and bispectrum that accounts for redshift-space distortions, scale-dependent bias, and nonlinear effects. Through a joint Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) analysis, we find that the power spectrum alone provides competitive constraints, while the inclusion of the bispectrum, specifically targeting the squeezed-limit configurations, improves the $f_{\rm NL}$ constraint precision by approximately 5%-6%. Our joint analysis yields a constraint result of $f_{\rm NL}=-20\pm52$ for the mock data in the 1~($h^{-1}$Gpc)$^3$ comoving volume at the three redshifts, and the constraint accuracy is expected to be improved by several times or even one order of magnitude for the CSST full spectroscopic survey. This work demonstrates the potential of the Stage~IV surveys like CSST to probe inflationary physics, and highlights the importance of higher-order statistics in extracting information from large-scale structure surveys.

papers.title: Covariance shrinkage for cosmological inference with Sellentin-Heavens-type likelihoods
papers.summary: Covariance matrices used in astronomical and cosmological parameter inference are often estimated from a finite number of simulations, so covariance uncertainty can affect posterior calibration and parameter constraints. We study covariance regularisation from the perspective of likelihood-based inference with simulation-estimated covariance matrices. First, we analyse scalar covariance scaling under the Gaussian plug-in likelihood and the covariance-marginalised Sellentin--Heavens likelihood. Using an expected negative log-likelihood loss, we show that Hartlap covariance-side scaling is recovered as the optimum under the Gaussian plug-in likelihood, whereas the unscaled sample covariance is optimal under the Sellentin--Heavens likelihood. This shows that scalar covariance corrections are likelihood-dependent and that an additional Hartlap-type global scaling is not favoured once covariance uncertainty is marginalised through the Sellentin--Heavens likelihood. We then introduce a shrinkage formulation in which the sample covariance is regularised towards a spherical target and the shrinkage intensity is treated as an auxiliary inferential quantity. A prior is assigned to the shrinkage intensity, the likelihood induces its posterior distribution, and the final parameter posterior is obtained by marginalising over it. Monte Carlo experiments show that shrinkage substantially improves covariance conditioning, while marginalisation over the shrinkage intensity propagates uncertainty about the amount of regularisation into posterior inference. The proposed approach provides a simple way to combine covariance-marginalised likelihood inference with structural regularisation of noisy simulation-estimated covariance matrices.

papers.title: MUSEQuBES: Probing Anisotropies in Gas and Metal Distributions in the Circumgalactic Medium
papers.summary: 研究113个孤立星系CGM中H I和O VI气体的方位角分布，发现低质量星系在盘面和极向都有增强，而高质量星系则呈现均匀分布，O VI运动学保留起源位置记忆。

papers.title: Early Results from the Coma Legacy IFU Survey (CLIFS): Ram Pressure Induced Shocks and Ionization in Jellyfish Tails
papers.summary: 对彗星状星系（jellyfish galaxies）的初步研究显示，其尾部电离辐射主要来自冲压剥离驱动的激波，而非恒星形成活动。

papers.title: The LOFAR Two-metre Sky Survey: VII. Third Data Release
authors: J. M. G. H. J. de Jong
papers.summary: LOFAR巡天第三版数据发布，覆盖北天88%区域，包含1360万射电源，提供高分辨率射电图像和完整数据产品

papers.title: Cosmic topology. Part IIc. Detectability with non-standard primordial power spectrum
papers.summary: 该研究探讨了宇宙非平凡拓扑结构对CMB的影响，特别是原初功率谱偏离标准尺度不变性如何改变拓扑可探测性，使用Kullback-Leibler散度和CatBoost机器学习方法进行评估。

papers.title: Intracluster globular clusters as tracers of the mass assembly of the Hydra I galaxy cluster
papers.summary: 利用球状星团研究近邻水蛇座I星系团的组装历史，发现红蓝球状星团空间分布存在明显二分性，蓝球状星团追踪星系团整体引力势，并提出利用球状星团约束星系光度函数演化的新方法。

papers.title: Large-scale and local environmental drivers of quenching: tracing H$α$ concentration in X-ray and optical galaxy groups
papers.summary: 研究通过多尺度环境分析，发现星系团X射线辐射和宇宙网节点会促使恒星形成向星系中心集中，而星系自旋方向与纤维结构的相对取向揭示了不同的气体吸积机制。

papers.title: Ultramassive Black Holes and the Three $M$-$σ$ Relations
papers.summary: 论文分析了超大质量黑洞观测数据，发现黑洞质量与星系速度弥散的关系在不同类型星系中具有相同形式但不同归一化，观测值未达到理论最大值

papers.title: Gravitational Wave Echoes of the First Order Phase Transition in a Kination-Induced Big Bang
papers.summary: 该论文研究了在早期宇宙中，由运动主导时期结束时的第一级相变产生的引力波，提出了运动诱导大爆炸场景，计算了引力波背景的峰值振幅和频率范围。

papers.title: The Signature of Strong High-Redshift Radio Backgrounds on the Cosmic Dawn 21-cm Bispectrum
papers.summary: 该研究分析了在银河系射电背景过剩情况下21厘米信号的非高斯性，发现早期星系射电效率的适度增强会显著影响小尺度21厘米双谱，挤压极限双谱的符号变化向低红移移动，可作为区分不同射电背景模型的观测特征。

papers.title: ARCHITECTS II: Impact of subgrid physics on the observable properties of the circumgalactic medium
papers.summary: 通过对比三种不同亚网格反馈模型（机械反馈、机械+热反馈、延迟冷却）对同一星系的模拟，研究发现尽管这些模型能产生相同恒星质量，但会导致不同的CGM性质。吸收线柱密度和覆盖分数是区分亚网格模型的有效诊断工具，但所有模型都无法完全重现观测的HI和MgII覆盖分数。

papers.title: Abundances in 78 metal-rich bulge spheroid stars from APOGEE
papers.summary: 该研究通过分析银河系内区金属富集恒星（[Fe/H] > -0.8）的化学丰度，揭示了早期球状核球形成的化学特征，发现磷和铈在特定金属丰度下存在过量，并识别出与核盘和棒结构相关的化学独特星群。

papers.title: First statistical constraints on galactic scale outflows properties traced by their extended Mg II emission with MUSE
papers.summary: 首次对47个0.7<z<2.0的恒星形成星系进行MgII发射晕的统计研究，发现延伸至数十千秒差距的MgII发射，揭示了恒星形成驱动外流的性质。

papers.title: Beyond $Λ$CDM: fundamental constants as cosmological observables
papers.summary: 该论文提出通过测量精细结构常数α的变化来检验ΛCDM模型之外的物理，利用WST等设施可获得大量α测量数据，为区分不同宇宙学模型提供关键约束。

papers.title: Two-dimensional metallicity distribution of the ionized gas in NGC 628 and NGC 6946
papers.summary: 该研究对NGC 628和NGC 6946两个旋涡星系进行了H II区观测，获得了方位角分辨率的星表，分析了恒星形成过程的多个特性，包括金属丰度、激发度等的径向分布和二维分布。

papers.title: Physical properties of circumnuclear ionising clusters. IV. NGC 1097
papers.summary: 利用MUSE积分场光谱观测NGC 1097星系核周恒星形成环，发现24个HII区具有超太阳金属丰度（最高达太阳5倍），揭示了高金属丰度下电离参数关系的断裂，支持星爆传播模型并探测到喷流光学特征。

papers.title: Global statistical entropy and its implications for the main sequences of stars and galaxies
papers.summary: 论文提出在耗散系统中，恒星和星系等有序结构通过产生低能光子来增加全局熵，这符合热力学第二定律，而非导致无序。

papers.title: A deep MeerKAT view of associated HI absorption in radio AGNs at intermediate redshift: Role of absorber geometry and conditions of the gas
papers.summary: MeerKAT观测发现，在17个中等红移的强射电源中，探测到3个新的HI吸收系统，其中2个是关联吸收，1个是局域干涉系统。关联吸收主要出现在年轻射电源中，且UV光度低于特定阈值。

papers.title: On the radial velocity wave in the Galactic disk
papers.summary: 该研究通过线性扰动理论推导出银河系中恒星径向速度与角动量关系的解析公式，发现短寿命螺旋臂扰动能解释观测到的Jφ-vR波信号，而潮汐扰动或银河系棒则不能。

papers.title: Modelling the photometric and morphological evolution of disc galaxies in the cluster environment
papers.summary: 该研究通过构建简化的星系团演化模型，约束了星系团中盘星系从蓝色旋涡星系向红色S0星系转变的特征时标，发现星暴淬灭时标与星系-团质量比呈强反相关，而形态转变时标基本独立，支持光度谱老化是旋涡星系向S0转变的主要机制。

papers.title: The sub-arcsecond ILT view of the Boötes Deep Field: A link between low-frequency kiloparsec radio morphology and AGN driven ionised outflows
authors: Jurjen M. G. H. J. de Jong
papers.summary: 利用国际LOFAR望远镜（ILT）在144 MHz获得的高分辨率图像，研究活动星系核（AGN）的[O III]外流与千秒差距尺度射电发射之间的关联。

papers.title: Galactic seismology: can a disc-crossing impulse explain the large-scale perturbations in the Milky Way's disc?
papers.summary: 研究探讨人马座矮星系最后一次穿越银河系盘面是否能够同时解释多种观测到的盘面扰动现象，包括旋臂、波纹、相螺旋和角动量-径向速度波。

papers.title: A gas-phase "top-down" chemical link between aldehydes and alcohols
papers.summary: 通过DFT计算和天体化学模型研究发现，乙醇与氟/氯的气相反应可以无势垒地发生氢原子提取，生成的乙醇自由基进一步与氢原子反应可生成乙醛，揭示了从醇到醛的新型"自上而下"气相转化途径。

papers.title: On the coupled origin of the stellar IMF and multiplicity
papers.summary: 论文通过层次碎裂模型研究恒星初始质量函数(IMF)的形成机制，发现从观测到的顶部重的核心质量函数(CMF)到标准IMF需要至少4级层次碎裂，但仅靠层次碎裂无法解释恒星多重性观测结果。

papers.title: Kinematic-Distance Biases in the Inner Milky Way from a Stellar-Dynamically Constrained Bar
papers.summary: 该研究量化了棒驱动非圆周运动如何影响使用运动学距离方法重建的银河系气体分布图，发现在棒主导区域该方法因违背圆周运动假设而产生系统性误差。

papers.title: The SAMI Galaxy Survey: Quenching of Star Formation in Clusters III. Ram-Pressure-Affected Galaxy Populations
papers.summary: 利用SAMI巡天的空间分辨光谱数据，通过电离气体形态对8个邻近星系团中的星系进行分类，研究星系团环境如何通过冲压剥离影响星系演化。

papers.title: WLM: Dynamics of an isolated Dwarf Irregular Galaxy Under Ram Pressure in the Local Group
papers.summary: WLM矮不规则星系因星际介质产生的冲压压力导致气体损失和动力学扰动，特别是外围区域，需要完整建模其动力学组件以获得准确质量估计

papers.title: Insights into the Physical Nature of Polar Ring Galaxies from H I Observations
papers.summary: 极环星系（PRGs）是主星系体与外部气体和恒星环几乎垂直的特殊星系系统。研究通过FAST望远镜等观测数据，分析了40个确认的PRGs的H I特性，发现它们主要位于绿谷或淬灭区域，但气体分数高于典型早型星系，表明存在气体吸积。H I轮廓不对称性与ALFALFA样本显著不同，且Tully-Fisher关系存在较大散射，但假设气体主要分布在极环中时散射减小。

papers.title: Little Red Dots on FIRE: The Ability of Bursty Galaxies to Host an Abundant Population of High-Redshift AGN
papers.summary: 韦伯望远镜发现大量高红移"小红点"AGN候选体，理论模型显示恒星反馈会阻碍黑洞持续吸积。本文通过模拟分析发现，两种吸积模型都能解释观测到的AGN丰度，但会过多预测低光度AGN。提出一种可能的解决方案：这些AGN可能是超爱丁顿吸积的黑洞。

papers.title: The GECKOS Survey: Extraplanar ionised gas in star-forming galaxies from eDIG to galaxy-scale winds
papers.summary: 使用MUSE观测9个类似银河系质量的侧向星系，发现所有SFR≥1 M⊙/yr的星系都存在延伸到2-8 kpc的盘外气体，高SFR系统有更亮更延伸的Hα发射和双锥形速度弥散分布，表明存在外流。

papers.title: Statistical study for binary star evolution in dense embedded clusters
papers.summary: 该研究通过N体模拟分析了嵌入星团中原始双星系统的早期动力学演化，发现双星存活与瓦解主要受结合能和轨道周期控制，硬双星加热星团抑制宽双星形成，质量比分布更多受恒星物理过程影响。

papers.title: Cross-correlating galaxies and cosmic dispersion measures: Constraints on the gas-to-halo mass relation from 2MASS galaxies and 133 localized fast radio bursts
papers.summary: 通过2MASS星系与FRB的交叉相关分析，发现星系晕中热气体质量分数低于TNG300模拟预测，表明需要更强的反馈机制。

papers.title: Tidal features as tracers of galaxy merger histories: the colours of tidal features in HSC-SSP
papers.summary: 该研究通过分析32,000个星系的径向颜色剖面，比较有和无潮汐特征的星系，发现潮汐特征能揭示星系合并历史，特别是红序星系的外围颜色更红表明其经历了贫气体的小质量合并。

papers.title: Radiation hydrodynamic simulation of the Haro 11 galaxy: the escape of LyC and Ly$α$ in a dwarf galaxy merger
papers.summary: 该研究通过辐射流体动力学模拟分析了Haro 11星系合并过程，追踪了LyC、Lyα和Hα的逃逸分数变化，发现近心点通过时LyC逃逸分数大幅增加，而Lyα逃逸分数仅适度增加，这与观测到的Haro 11性质相符。

papers.title: The LEGARE Project. I. Chemical evolution model of the Nuclear Stellar Disc in a Bayesian framework
papers.summary: 该研究通过贝叶斯方法构建银河系核星盘的首个化学演化模型，发现基于内盘气体流入的形成场景与观测到的低金属丰度尾部不一致，需要额外的贫金属气体稀释才能解释观测数据。

papers.title: MAJORS II: HCO+& HCN Abundances in W40
papers.summary: 对W40大质量恒星形成区中心区域的HCN和HCO+ J=3-2谱线观测，结合辐射转移和化学演化模型，确定了这两种分子的丰度范围，并估计了产生这些发射的致密气体密度。

papers.title: Metallicity Structure in Galactic Longitude-Velocity Diagrams of the Milky Way Disk and FIRE-2 Simulations
papers.summary: 该研究探讨了使用经度-速度图作为诊断工具来研究银河系盘金属丰度结构的方法，通过对比观测数据和模拟结果，发现这种不依赖距离测量的方法可以探测径向金属丰度梯度，但当前观测误差限制了探测方位角变化的能力。

papers.title: Exploring the effects of diffuse ionised gas in two local analogues of high-redshift star-forming galaxies
papers.summary: 研究通过MUSE数据空间解析两个高红移星系本地类似体（UM 462和IIZw 40）中的弥散电离气体（DIG），发现DIG会显著影响发射线比和气体金属丰度的测定，可能导致虚假的金属丰度梯度。

papers.title: Almanac: HMC sampling with bounded velocity
papers.summary: 该论文研究了哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样中动量分布的选择对采样效率的影响，测试了基于相对论和学生t分布的动能替代方案，发现在有利情况下可提升一个数量级的采样效率。

papers.title: Calibrating redshift distributions at $z>2$ with Lyman-$α$ forest cross-correlations
papers.summary: 利用莱曼α森林与高红移（2<z<3）测光星系交叉相关来校准星系红移分布，通过模拟验证该方法可行性，在特定条件下可获得高信噪比测量。

papers.title: Constraints on the Hot Circumgalactic Medium around Nearby L* Galaxies from SRG/eROSITA All Sky Survey
papers.summary: 首次通过SRG/eROSITA全天巡天数据堆叠分析，在近邻L*星系周围50kpc范围内探测到显著的热CGM弥散X射线辐射，光谱特征支持热气体起源而非非热主导，与IllustrisTNG模拟预测一致。

papers.title: Unveiling a Thin Filament of the Cosmic Web in the Ursa Major Supergroup
papers.summary: FAST望远镜在Ursa Major超星系团中探测到一个由16个星系和5个无星气体团组成的超薄HI纤维结构，长度约0.9 Mpc，厚度仅相当于星系直径，观测到星系-纤维自旋对齐和速度梯度，表明存在冷吸积流。

papers.title: UNCOVER/MegaScience Finds Uniform and Highly Bursty Star Formation at 3 < z < 9, consistent with the High-Redshift UV Luminosity Function
papers.summary: 该研究通过测量星系谱线-紫外辐射比(r_line)和等效宽度，分析z~3-9星系的恒星形成历史，发现恒星形成爆发性在z~3-7期间没有显著演化，这有助于解释高红移明亮星系的丰度。

papers.title: XMM-Newton observations of ten high-redshift CAMIRA clusters of galaxies
papers.summary: XMM-Newton观测10个高红移富星系团，发现只有10%处于动力学弛豫状态，标度关系在z~1时已基本确立，高红移星系团AGN活动显著增强。

score_breakdown.label: cluster gas rather than high-z galaxy gas

papers.title: Cis--Trans Rotational Isomerism of Seleno-, Thio-, and Formic Acids and Their Dimers: Chemical Kinetics under Interstellar Conditions
papers.summary: 研究在低温惰性气体基质中分子隧穿反应，计算了硒代、硫代和单体甲酸及其二聚体的顺反异构化反应速率常数

papers.title: Kinematics of the HII region NGC 7538 from study of the Ha line
papers.summary: 通过对NGC 7538 HII区域的Hα法布里-珀罗观测，发现存在蓝移电离气体流，速度超过11 km/s，并揭示了非热运动、湍流和大尺度速度梯度，提出中心区域运动学可由IRS1外流和IRS6前方形成的风弓激波叠加解释。

papers.title: The baryonic mass-size relation of galaxies. II. Implications for the evolutionary paths between star-forming and passive galaxies
papers.summary: 该研究分析了星系的重子质量-尺寸关系，发现恒星形成星系和被动星系在重子质量-尺寸平面上遵循不同的结构关系，揭示了星系形态演化路径。

papers.title: Decomposing the growth mechanisms of galaxies over the last 10 billion years
papers.summary: 论文主张需要建设10米级多目标光谱设施来研究宇宙中星系的合并过程及其对星系质量积累的影响

papers.title: An azimuthally resolved study of sloshing cold fronts in three nearby galaxy clusters
papers.summary: 对三个邻近星系团中晃动冷锋的详细分析表明，这些冷锋的热压力存在径向向内不足，需要气体整体运动的速度梯度来补偿，但未发现显著的方位角速度梯度，暗示磁场和粘性等替代机制对维持冷锋锐度至关重要。

score_breakdown.label: cluster gas rather than high-z galaxy gas

papers.title: Cosmic strings, domain walls and environment-dependent clustering
papers.summary: 论文研究了非最小耦合标量场驱动的晚期结构诱导相变对宇宙结构形成的影响，通过norns相对论性宇宙粒子网格代码模拟，发现第五力在低密度区域产生显著偏离LCDM的效应，同时在整体功率谱上保持适度变化。

papers.title: A jet-gas interaction beyond the host galaxy: detection of a neutral hydrogen outflow at cosmic noon
papers.summary: 使用升级的巨型米波射电望远镜观测到高红移FR II射电星系0731+438中由喷流驱动的中性氢外流，这是此类外流的罕见发现。

papers.title: Probing the kinematics of the Local Group with chemically enriched gas in the Hestia simulations
papers.summary: 该研究通过Hestia项目的高分辨率模拟，分析了本地星系群中不同离子（H I、C IV、Si III、O VI、O VII、O VIII）的气体运动学特征，特别关注了向本地星系群质心方向的大尺度运动模式。

papers.title: Joint constraints on cosmic birefringence and early dark energy from ACT, Planck, DESI, and PantheonPlus
papers.summary: 该研究通过联合分析Planck、DESI DR1、Pantheon+和ACT数据，对早期暗能量模型与CMB光子之间的Chern-Simons耦合引起的宇宙双折射效应进行全参数约束，发现支持更高的哈勃常数和较大的早期暗能量比例。

papers.title: The BINGO project X. Cosmological parameter constraints from HI Intensity Mapping lognormal simulations
papers.summary: BINGO中性氢强度映射实验通过结合普朗克CMB数据，能将宇宙学参数置信区域缩小至普朗克单独结果的40%，显著提升参数估计精度，并对暗能量状态方程提供竞争性约束。

papers.title: A precessing jet from an active galactic nucleus drives gas outflow from a disk galaxy
papers.summary: 通过多波段观测发现活动星系VV 340a中的低功率喷流存在进动，驱动气体外流并影响星系恒星形成

papers.title: The Secret Lives of Open Clusters: a Multiwavelength Examination of Three Open Clusters
papers.summary: 利用多波段观测研究三个不同年龄银河系疏散星团（IC 2602、NGC 2632、M67）中动力学相互作用产生的独特天体，发现X射线源数量随星团年龄变化，并识别出可能的黑洞双星或活跃双星系统。

papers.title: MUSEQuBES: Investigating the Physical and Chemical Properties of Circumgalactic Gas Around Ly$α$ Emitters at $z \approx 3.3$
papers.summary: 该研究分析了z≈3.3的莱曼α发射体（LAEs）相关吸收体的物理性质，发现高柱密度吸收体存在双峰金属丰度分布，分别对应原始流入气体和金属富集的外流气体，且吸收体性质与宿主星系特性无显著相关性。

papers.title: First direct electron temperature measurement in [O II] zone in I Zw 18
papers.summary: 该研究利用DESI DR1光谱数据，首次在极贫金属矮星系I Zw 18中直接测量了低电离区的电子温度，并获得了高、中电离区的温度数据，揭示了不同电离区间的显著温度差异，为极高温度下的温度关系校准提供了重要参考。

papers.title: Local Group analogues in a cosmological context -- I. Relating velocity structure to the cosmic web
papers.summary: 本研究利用ABACUSSUMMIT模拟探索本星系群类似系统与周围大尺度环境的关系，发现耦合能量E_coupling是关键参数：高耦合能量的系统倾向于位于高密度区域，而低耦合能量的系统则位于低密度环境且与宇宙纤维结构对齐。

papers.title: Baryon Acoustic Oscillations from the C IV Forest with DESI DR2
papers.summary: 该研究通过DESI巡天的第二期数据，测量了三重电离碳C IV吸收与类星体及发射线星系位置的交叉相关中的重子声学振荡信号，首次在CIV×ELG交叉相关中探测到BAO特征。

papers.title: I can see your halo: Constraining the Milky Way halo DM with FRB population studies
papers.summary: 使用98个高银纬FRB数据约束银河系晕的色散量贡献，得到DM_MW,halo=68^{+27}_{-24} pc/cm³，与文献结果一致

papers.title: Morphologies arising from the gas flow in the innermost kiloparsec of barred galaxy models
papers.summary: 通过流体动力学模拟研究棒旋星系中心1kpc区域气体形态特征的形成机制，发现引力势参数不足以准确预测气体动力学，气体声速对核环和核旋臂形态有决定性影响。

papers.title: The dynamical and thermodynamic effects of turbulence on the cosmic baryonic fluid
papers.summary: 该研究使用宇宙学模拟表明，湍流在理解宇宙中"缺失重子"的空间分布和物理起源中起关键作用，挑战了传统的激波加热观点。

papers.title: Investigating HII Regions in the Disk of NGC 7331 with the Circumgalactic H$α$ Spectrograph
papers.summary: 该研究利用积分视场光谱仪数据分析了NGC 7331星系盘中HII区域的电离气体运动学，建立了Hα光度与速度弥散的关系，并发现速度弥散与恒星形成率面密度相关。

papers.title: Integral field spectroscopy and numerical simulations of the NGC 2207/IC 2163 system
papers.summary: 对NGC 2207/IC 2163相互作用星系系统进行积分场光谱分析，研究了约1000个HII区复合体，分析了氧丰度梯度、恒星形成过程变化、电离气体运动学，并通过数值模拟解释了观测结果。

papers.title: HI-bearing dark galaxies predictions from constrained Local Group simulations: how many and where to find them
papers.summary: 使用多种先进流体动力学模拟预测本地群中暗星系的数量、性质及探测可能性，发现暗星系主要存在于低密度区域，FAST望远镜可探测到最多8个暗星系

papers.title: Star Formation in Galaxy Collisions: Dependence on Impact Velocity and Gas Mass of Galaxies in GADGET-4 Simulations
papers.summary: 该研究通过流体动力学模拟探究了星系碰撞中恒星形成率的变化，发现初始相对速度、星系间初始距离和气体含量是影响恒星形成率的关键参数。

papers.title: A Galactic Supernova Remnant Candidate at l =25.8, b=+0.2 Revealed by Near-Infrared Imaging and Spectroscopy
papers.summary: 利用IGRINS红外光谱仪观测新发现的超新星遗迹候选体G25.8+0.2，发现其[Fe II]发射存在多个运动学成分，高速成分显示激波激发特征，低速成分符合H II区光致电离起源，该源位于G26恒星形成复合体中，与射电壳层形态一致，表明该区域存在近期超新星活动。

papers.title: E-XQR-30: Evidence for an Increase in the Ionization State of Metal Absorbers from z~6 to z~2
papers.summary: 研究利用E-XQR-30巡天的488个金属吸收系统（4.3<z<6.3），发现电离状态随红移演化：低电离系统比例从z~6的24%降至z~4.3的2%，高电离系统比例从52%增至82%。log(N_CII/N_CIV)比值在z~6到z~2间下降约20倍。

papers.title: The origin of strong $α$-element bimodalities in FIRE simulations of Milky Way-mass galaxies
papers.summary: FIRE-2模拟研究发现，银河系质量星系中约25%能产生强烈的α元素双峰分布，这主要由恒星形成率快速下降期间低气体分数条件下的化学演化驱动，而非主要星系合并或径向重分布。

papers.title: Low Metallicity Gas on the Outskirts of the Local Group: the Circumgalactic Medium of Sextans B
papers.summary: 对Sextans B矮不规则星系环星系介质(CGM)的紫外吸收线分析显示其CGM具有极低的金属丰度，是Local Group中金属丰度最低的气体之一，且CGM质量远超星系本身的HI质量和恒星质量。

papers.title: Isotropic stochastic gravitational wave background reconstruction for Taiji constellation
papers.summary: 开发了用于太极空间引力波探测器探测随机引力波背景的初步数据处理流程，能够成功恢复已知谱密度参数，并利用跨维MCMC方法重建未知谱形态的背景

papers.title: The Tianlai-WIYN North Celestial Cap Redshift Survey
papers.summary: 在北极天顶附近进行的小型低红移光谱巡天，为Tianlai射电干涉仪的21厘米中性氢观测提供红移空间模板，获得了898个红移数据，发现11个星系团候选体。

papers.title: The ionization structure and chemical history in isolated H ii regions of dwarf galaxies with VIMOS/IFU II. The Leo A galaxy
papers.summary: 研究Leo A矮星系中电离气体的空间分布和化学演化，发现其电离主要由中心年轻星团驱动，金属丰度较低，化学演化符合气体平衡模型

papers.title: Evidence for a Stratified Accretion Disk Wind in AGN
papers.summary: 观测证据支持活动星系核中存在分层吸积盘风，基于宽窄发射线的多波段光谱分析，显示不同电离态谱线具有不同的运动学特征，符合辐射驱动分层风模型。

papers.title: A Velocity Coupled Radial Acceleration Ansatz for Disk-Galaxy Rotation Curves: Fits to SPARC, Bayesian Inference, and Parameter Identifiability
papers.summary: 研究提出了一种最小化的现象学替代模型（VCA），通过径向加速度与切向速度的耦合来解释星系旋转曲线，与标准暗晕模型（NFW和Burkert）在SPARC样本上进行了比较。

papers.title: A novel sub-grid model for super-Eddington accretion of spinning black holes in galaxy-scale simulations
papers.summary: 该研究提出了一个用于超爱丁顿吸积的黑洞质量和自旋演化子网格模型，通过模拟发现角动量错位是维持超爱丁顿吸积的关键条件，这有助于解释早期宇宙中超大质量黑洞的形成。

papers.title: How Mergers and Flybys Shape Azimuthal Age Patterns in Spiral Galaxies
papers.summary: 利用Auriga宇宙学模拟研究银河系质量螺旋星系中年轻恒星（<20亿年）的方位角年龄分布，发现螺旋臂前缘通常比后缘年轻30-80百万年，但气体丰富的相互作用会破坏这种年龄梯度，且星系相互作用后约6亿年可恢复典型年龄模式。

papers.title: The Competing Influence of Ram Pressure and Tidal Interaction in NGC 2276
papers.summary: 研究通过多波段数据分析NGC 2276星系中恒星种群分布，发现年轻恒星在星系前导侧更集中，支持冲压剥离是主导机制，但潮汐作用也可能有贡献。

papers.title: Archaeological investigation of galaxies' evolutionary history in the cosmic middle ages
papers.summary: 宇宙中世纪（过去80-100亿年）是星系演化关键期，需要大规模光谱巡天研究星系物理性质与环境相互作用

papers.title: MUSE Analysis of Gas around Galaxies (MAGG) - VII. Emission line galaxies near strong blended Ly$α$ absorption systems at $z\gtrsim3$
papers.summary: 该研究通过MAGG巡天数据，分析了z≳3时强混合Lyα吸收系统(SBLAs)与Lyα发射星系(LAEs)之间的关联，发现两者在投影距离≤300kpc和视线速度差≤300km/s范围内存在显著相关性，且相关性随吸收通量减小而增强。

papers.title: Gas Accretion from a Neighbouring Galaxy Fuels the Low-luminosity AGN in NGC 4278
papers.summary: FAST望远镜观测发现NGC 4278椭圆星系通过潮汐相互作用从邻近星系吸积气体，为低光度活动星系核提供燃料，并可能产生相对论性喷流和TeV伽马射线辐射。

papers.title: Portrait of a Galaxy on FIRE: Is the $α$-bimodality a natural consequence of inside-out disc growth in a hierarchical formation scenario?
papers.summary: 模拟研究表明，银河系盘状星系的α元素双峰性可由小规模合并、气体流动和热日冕演化驱动，无需大规模合并或显著径向迁移。

papers.title: Note on bulk viscosity as an alternative to dark energy
papers.summary: 研究表明，体粘性作为宇宙加速膨胀的解释机制面临重大物理挑战：两种产生体粘性的物理场景（非最小相互作用流体和理想气体弹性碰撞）都无法在保持物理合理性的前提下产生足够负的有效压力。

papers.title: Revealing the baryon cycle in Galaxy Clusters: connecting galaxy dynamics and gas thermodynamics using (sub-)mm-wave and optical IFU surveys
papers.summary: 本文提出通过结合宽场光学IFU巡天（如CATARSIS）和大口径亚毫米波望远镜，实现对星系动力学和气体热力学的同时观测，以全面理解环境过程对星系演化的影响。

papers.title: Mass Assembly and Chemical Complexity in the Milky Way
papers.summary: 亚毫米/毫米波谱线可用于研究银河系化学复杂性、物理条件、动力学及磁场强度，是追踪质量聚集和结构形成的重要示踪剂

papers.title: Searching for Intermediate-Mass Black Holes in Milky Way satellites
papers.summary: 该论文探讨了中等质量黑洞（IMBHs）的研究现状，指出目前观测证据有限，并提出了通过新一代光谱设施测量矮星系中IMBHs占据分数的科学目标。

papers.title: Connection between galaxy morphology and dark-matter halo structure II: predicting disk structure from dark-matter halo properties
papers.summary: 使用TNG50模拟研究星系盘结构与暗物质晕性质的关系，通过随机森林和符号回归建立预测模型，发现盘高度比盘大小更容易预测，低质量晕预测精度更高

papers.title: Eccentric Binaries Accreting from Thin Disks: Orbital Evolution
papers.summary: 该研究首次系统性地研究了薄盘吸积对偏心双星系统轨道演化的影响，发现薄盘不仅加速双星旋进，还能以更高速率激发偏心率，且薄盘驱动的偏心率可达0.6以上，远高于厚盘的稳定点0.425。

papers.title: Kinematics of H I and O VI Absorbers: Insights into the Turbulence Driver of the Multiphase Circumgalactic Medium
papers.summary: 该研究通过分析H I和O VI吸收体的谱线宽度与柱密度相关性，揭示了星系周围多相介质中的大规模气体运动学特征，发现H I和O VI分别追踪不同物理条件的气体结构，共同描绘了跨越五个数量级空间尺度的连续湍流级联图像。
